[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001000 4
1 000000001 1
2 000100010 2
3 000000000 a
4 010001111 5
5 000110111 5
6 111000110 5
7 001001000 2

01 10 001100001 3
12 21 000100010 2 match 2
23 32 011001111 6
34 43 010111000 4
45 54 111110001 6
56 65 110001110 5
67 76 110100011 5
70 07 111101000 5

35 53 101001001 4
46 64 001111111 7

60 06 001001011 4
71 17 110001001 4

50 05 111000101 5
61 16 000101010 3

37 73 101100100 4
